Modosapients are [[Sapient|Sapients]] whose [[toposophic level]] is lower than [[transapients]].

Modosapients are sometimes called Modosophonts.

The concept comes from [[Orion’s Arm]] like [[transapients]] but it had its name changed from modosophont which was judged too obscure to understand 

==Types==

* [[humans]] (only ones that currently are known to exist)
* [[Zoosapients]]
* [[Turings]]
* [[Xenosapients]]
[[Category:Sapients]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Modosapients]][[Category:Modosapients]]
[[sn:Modosapients]]
[[Category:Pages]]
